title: Bifrost Helm Chart Values
description: Schema for Bifrost Helm chart values.yaml

tag.description: Image tag (required - validated at template render time)

enabled.description: Create namespaced Role/RoleBinding for Kubernetes pod discovery when cluster discovery type is kubernetes

encryptionKey.description: Encryption key for sensitive data. If not set, encryption is disabled and data is stored in plaintext.

encryptionKeySecret.description: Reference to an existing Kubernetes secret holding the encryption key. Takes precedence over `encryptionKey` when `name` is set.

dropExcessRequests.description: Whether to drop excess requests when pool is full

initialPoolSize.description: Initial size of the connection pool

allowedOrigins.description: CORS allowed origins (supports "*" or URI strings)

disableContentLogging.description: Disable logging of sensitive content (inputs, outputs, embeddings, etc.)

allowPerRequestContentStorageOverride.description: Allow individual requests to override content storage via the x-bf-disable-content-logging header or context key, and to opt in to raw-byte persistence in logs via x-bf-store-raw-request-response. When false (default), the global disable_content_logging setting is authoritative and per-request storage overrides are ignored. Does not control sending raw bytes back to callers.

allowPerRequestRawOverride.description: Allow individual requests to send raw provider request/response bytes back to the caller via the x-bf-send-back-raw-request and x-bf-send-back-raw-response headers. When false (default), the provider-level send_back_raw_request/response settings are authoritative and per-request overrides are ignored. Does not affect raw-byte persistence in logs.

disableDbPingsInHealth.description: Disable DB pings in health check

logRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain logs

maxRequestBodySizeMb.description: Maximum request body size in MB

compat.description: Compat plugin configuration for request type conversion, parameter dropping, and parameter value conversion

convertTextToChat.description: Convert text completion requests to chat for models that only support chat

convertChatToResponses.description: Convert chat completion requests to responses for models that only support responses

shouldDropParams.description: Drop unsupported parameters based on model catalog allowlist

shouldConvertParams.description: Converts model parameter values that are not supported by the model.

prometheusLabels.description: Labels to use for Prometheus metrics

headerFilterConfig.description: Global header filtering configuration for x-bf-eh-* headers forwarded to LLM providers

allowlist.description: If non-empty, only these headers (from x-bf-eh-* prefix) are allowed to be forwarded

denylist.description: Headers to always block from being forwarded

enforceAuthOnInference.description: Require auth (VK, API key, or user token) on inference endpoints

allowedHeaders.description: Additional allowed headers for CORS and WebSocket

mcpAgentDepth.description: DEPRECATED: Maximum depth for MCP agent mode tool execution. Use bifrost.mcp.toolManagerConfig.maxAgentDepth.

mcpToolExecutionTimeout.description: DEPRECATED: Timeout for individual MCP tool execution in seconds. Use bifrost.mcp.toolManagerConfig.toolExecutionTimeout.

mcpCodeModeBindingLevel.description: DEPRECATED: Code mode binding level for MCP tools. Use bifrost.mcp.toolManagerConfig.codeModeBindingLevel.

mcpToolSyncInterval.description: DEPRECATED: Global tool sync interval in minutes (0 = disabled). Use bifrost.mcp.toolSyncInterval.

asyncJobResultTTL.description: Default TTL for async job results in seconds (default: 3600 = 1 hour)

requiredHeaders.description: Headers that must be present on every request. Requests missing any of these headers are rejected with 400. Case-insensitive matching.

loggingHeaders.description: Headers to capture in log metadata. Values are extracted from incoming requests and stored in the metadata field of log entries.

whitelistedRoutes.description: Routes that bypass auth middleware. Requests to these exact paths skip authentication checks.

hideDeletedVirtualKeysInFilters.description: When true, deleted virtual keys are omitted from logs and MCP logs filter data.

mcpDisableAutoToolInject.description: DEPRECATED: When true, MCP tools are not automatically injected into requests. Use bifrost.mcp.toolManagerConfig.disableAutoToolInject.

routingChainMaxDepth.description: Maximum depth for routing rule chain evaluation

mcpExternalBaseUrl.description: Public base URL for OAuth callbacks and discovery metadata when Bifrost runs behind a reverse proxy (e.g. "https://api.example.com"). Supports env var syntax: "env.MY_VAR".

pricingUrl.description: Custom pricing URL (optional, can be empty)

pricingSyncInterval.description: Pricing sync interval in seconds. Default is 24 hours. Minimum is 3600 seconds (1 hour).

codeModeBindingLevel.description: How tools are exposed in VFS for code execution

disableAutoToolInject.description: When true, MCP tools are not automatically injected into requests. Tools are only included when explicitly specified via request context filters or headers, such as x-bf-mcp-include-tools or x-bf-mcp-include-clients.

toolSyncInterval.description: Global default interval for syncing tools from MCP servers (Go duration string, e.g. '10m', '1h', '0s' to use runtime default). Legacy numeric nanoseconds are also supported for backward compatibility.

toolGroups.description: Enterprise MCP tool groups with optional governance associations

custom_labels.description: Custom labels to add to all metrics

push_gateway.description: Configuration for pushing metrics to a Prometheus Push Gateway for multi-node cluster deployments

enabled.description: Whether to enable pushing metrics to the Push Gateway

push_gateway_url.description: URL of the Prometheus Push Gateway (e.g., http://pushgateway:9091)

instance_id.description: Instance identifier for grouping metrics. If not set, hostname is used automatically.

push_interval.description: How often to push metrics in seconds

basic_auth.description: Basic authentication credentials for the Push Gateway

required_headers.description: Headers that must be present in requests

keys.description: API keys for embedding provider (required for semantic caching, not needed for direct caching with dimension: 1)

ttl.description: Time-to-live for cached responses (supports duration strings like '5m', '1h' or seconds as number, default: 5min)

default_cache_key.description: Default cache key for semantic cache lookups

service_name.description: Service name to be used for tracing

trace_type.description: Type of trace to use for the OTEL collector

protocol.description: Protocol to use for the OTEL collector

metrics_enabled.description: Enable push-based metrics export via OTLP. Recommended for multi-node cluster deployments.

metrics_endpoint.description: OTLP metrics endpoint URL (e.g., http://otel-collector:4318/v1/metrics for HTTP or otel-collector:4317 for gRPC)

headers.description: Custom headers for the collector (supports env.VAR_NAME prefix)

tls_ca_cert.description: Path to TLS CA certificate file

insecure.description: Skip TLS verification (ignored if tls_ca_cert is set)

placement.description: Plugin execution placement relative to built-in plugins

order.description: Position within placement group. Lower = earlier execution

virtual_key_id.description: Associate this budget to a virtual key (mutually exclusive with provider_config_id and team_id)

provider_config_id.description: Associate this budget to a virtual key provider config (mutually exclusive with virtual_key_id and team_id)

team_id.description: Associate this budget to a team (mutually exclusive with virtual_key_id and provider_config_id)

calendar_aligned.description: Snap budget reset windows to calendar boundaries

token_last_reset.description: Last time token counter was reset

request_last_reset.description: Last time request counter was reset

routingRules.description: Routing rules for dynamic provider/model selection based on CEL expressions

targets.description: Weighted routing targets. Weights must sum to 1.

provider_key_name.description: Optional provider key name. Resolved to internal key_id at config load time.

weight.description: Probability weight for this target (must be > 0, all weights must sum to 1)

query.description: Visual rule builder state for the management UI (react-querybuilder). Omitted unless exported from the dashboard. Not evaluated at routing runtime (cel_expression is). When present, must include combinator and rules[].

rules.description: Leaf rules (field, operator, value) and/or nested combinator+rules groups from the query builder.

modelConfigs.description: Per-model rate limit and budget configurations

pricingOverrides.description: Scoped pricing overrides applied at runtime by the model catalog

virtual_key_id.description: Virtual key ID (required for virtual_key* scopes)

provider_id.description: Provider name (required for provider* scopes; field key remains provider_id for compatibility)

provider_key_name.description: Provider key name alias. Resolved to internal provider key ID at config load time.

match_type.description: How the pattern is matched against model names

request_types.description: Request types this override applies to

region.description: Region label for cluster deployment (runtime default: unknown)

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed probes before marking as failed

grpc.description: gRPC transport settings for cluster counter-sync. Replaces gossip broadcast for governance counters; memberlist still handles membership.

port.description: TCP port for the cluster gRPC server

dialTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout when dialing peers, in seconds

serviceName.description: Service name for discovery backends (required for consul/etcd/udp; used as default for mdns)

bindPort.description: Port to bind for cluster communication

dialTimeout.description: Timeout for discovery dial operations as a Go duration string (e.g. '5s', '1m')

allowedAddressSpace.description: CIDR notation for allowed address spaces (e.g., ['10.0.0.0/8', '192.168.0.0/16'])

k8sLabelSelector.description: Kubernetes label selector for filtering pods

dnsNames.description: DNS names to resolve for node discovery

udpBroadcastPort.description: UDP broadcast port (0 means not configured)

consulAddress.description: Consul server address for service discovery

mdnsService.description: mDNS service name for local network discovery

scim.description: SAML/SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) configuration

provider.description: SCIM/SSO provider type (empty when not configured)

apiToken.description: Okta API token for Admin API access

userIdField.description: JWT claim field for user ID (default: 'sub')

teamIdsField.description: JWT claim field for team IDs (default: 'groups')

config.description: Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) JWT authentication configuration

tenantId.description: Azure tenant ID or 'common' for multi-tenant applications

clientSecret.description: Client secret (optional, required for token revocation)

cloud.description: Cloud environment: 'commercial' (default), 'gcc-high' for US Government GCC High, or 'dod' for Department of Defense

appIdUri.description: App ID URI for v1.0 tokens (e.g., api://{clientId})

userIdField.description: JWT claim field for user ID (default: 'oid')

teamIdsField.description: JWT claim field for team IDs (default: 'groups')

guardrails.description: Guardrails configuration for content moderation and policy enforcement

description.description: Description of what the rule does

cel_expression.description: CEL (Common Expression Language) expression for rule evaluation

query.description: Visual rule builder state for the management UI (react-querybuilder). Omitted unless exported from the dashboard. Not evaluated at runtime (cel_expression is).

rules.description: Leaf rules and/or nested combinator+rules groups from the query builder.

apply_to.description: When to apply the guardrail (input, output, or both)

sampling_rate.description: Percentage of requests to apply this rule to (0-100)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for rule execution

provider_config_ids.description: IDs of provider configurations to use with this rule

id.description: Unique identifier for the provider config

policy_name.description: Name of the specific policy to use

enabled.description: Whether this provider config is enabled

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for provider execution

accessProfiles.description: Enterprise access profile templates rendered as top-level access_profiles in config.json

websocket.description: Optional tuning for the WebSocket gateway (Responses API WebSocket Mode, Realtime API). WebSocket is always enabled; these fields override the high defaults.

maxConnectionsPerUser.description: Maximum concurrent WebSocket connections per user

transcriptBufferSize.description: Number of transcript entries to buffer for Realtime API mid-session fallback

maxIdlePerKey.description: Maximum idle connections per provider/key combination

maxTotalConnections.description: Maximum total idle connections across all providers

idleTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds before an idle connection is evicted

maxConnectionLifetimeSeconds.description: Maximum lifetime of a connection in seconds

className.description: Class name for Weaviate vector store

useTls.description: Enable TLS for the Redis/Valkey connection

insecureSkipVerify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for Redis/Valkey connections

caCertPem.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate to trust for Redis/Valkey TLS connections

clusterMode.description: Use Redis Cluster mode for cluster configuration endpoints

indexHost.description: Index host URL from Pinecone console (e.g., your-index.svc.environment.pinecone.io)

existingSecret.description: Name of existing secret containing Pinecone API key

apiKeyKey.description: Key in the secret containing the API key

authConfig.description: Authentication configuration. Deprecated: Use governance.auth_config instead.

disableAuthOnInference.description: Whether authentication is disabled on inference

store_raw_request_response.description: Capture raw request/response for plugins only; stripped before returning to client

weight.description: Routing weight for this key. Optional; defaults to 1 when omitted.

project_id.description: Google Cloud project ID (can use env. prefix)

access_key.description: AWS access key (can use env. prefix)

secret_key.description: AWS secret key (can use env. prefix)

session_token.description: AWS session token (can use env. prefix)

role_arn.description: AWS IAM role ARN for AssumeRole (can use env. prefix)

external_id.description: External ID for AssumeRole (can use env. prefix)

session_name.description: Role session name for AssumeRole (can use env. prefix)

batch_s3_config.description: S3 bucket configuration for Bedrock batch operations

prefix.description: S3 key prefix for batch files

is_default.description: Whether this is the default bucket for batch operations

url.description: VLLM server base URL (can use env. prefix)

model_name.description: Exact model name served on this VLLM instance

base_url.description: Base URL for the provider (optional, required for Ollama)

extra_headers.description: Additional headers to send with requests

insecure_skip_verify.description: Disable TLS certificate verification for provider connections. This bypasses server certificate validation and should be used only as a last resort when a trusted CA chain cannot be configured. Prefer ca_cert_pem for self-signed or private CA deployments.

ca_cert_pem.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate to trust for provider endpoint connections (e.g. self-signed or internal CA). Supports inline PEM or env.VAR_NAME.

stream_idle_timeout_in_seconds.description: Idle timeout per stream chunk in seconds. If no data is received for this many seconds, the stream is closed. Default: 60.

max_conns_per_host.description: Maximum number of TCP connections per provider host. For HTTP/2 (e.g. Bedrock), each connection supports ~100 concurrent streams. Default: 5000.

enforce_http2.description: Force HTTP/2 on provider connections (relevant for Bedrock and other net/http-based providers)

beta_header_overrides.description: Override default Anthropic beta header support per provider. Keys are header prefixes (e.g. 'redact-thinking-'), values are true (supported) or false (unsupported). Headers not listed use the built-in defaults.

url.description: URL of the proxy server (supports env.VAR_NAME or a literal URI)

ca_cert_pem.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate to trust for TLS connections through the proxy (for SSL-intercepting proxies, supports env.VAR_NAME)

isCodeModeClient.description: Whether this client is a code mode client

connectionString.description: HTTP or SSE URL (required for HTTP or SSE connections)

secretRef.description: Reference to an existing Kubernetes secret holding the MCP connection_string. Chart injects BIFROST_MCP_<NAME>_CONNECTION_STRING and rewrites connection_string in config.json.

toolsToExecute.description: Include-only list of tools to execute

toolSyncInterval.description: Per-client override for tool sync interval

isPingAvailable.description: Whether the MCP server supports ping

toolPricing.description: Tool pricing map (tool name to cost per execution)

allowedExtraHeaders.description: Allowlist of request-level headers that callers may forward to this MCP server. Use ['*'] to allow all headers.

allowOnAllVirtualKeys.description: When true, this MCP server is accessible to all virtual keys without requiring explicit per-key assignment.

tools.description: MCP tools included in this group

mcpClientName.description: MCP client name (resolved to client_id at startup)

toolNames.description: Tool names to allow. Empty means all tools from this MCP client.

virtualKeyProviderConfig.description: Provider configuration for a virtual key

allowed_models.description: Allowed models for this provider config. Use ["*"] to allow all models; empty array denies all (deny-by-default).

key_ids.description: Key identifiers allowed for this provider config. Use ["*"] to allow all keys; empty array denies all (deny-by-default). In Helm values, use provider key names.

keys.description: Provider keys for this config (empty means all keys allowed for this provider)

value.description: API key value (can use env. prefix)

models.description: Models this key can access. Use ["*"] to allow all models; empty array denies all (deny-by-default).

project_id.description: Google Cloud project ID (can use env. prefix)

access_key.description: AWS access key (can use env. prefix)

secret_key.description: AWS secret key (can use env. prefix)

session_token.description: AWS session token (can use env. prefix)

role_arn.description: AWS IAM role ARN for AssumeRole (can use env. prefix)

external_id.description: External ID for AssumeRole (can use env. prefix)

session_name.description: Role session name for AssumeRole (can use env. prefix)

batch_s3_config.description: S3 bucket configuration for Bedrock batch operations

prefix.description: S3 key prefix for batch files

is_default.description: Whether this is the default bucket for batch operations

url.description: VLLM server base URL (can use env. prefix)

model_name.description: Exact model name served on this VLLM instance
